title: More Nonsense Limerick 79
content:
There was a young person whose history
    Was always considered a mystery;
    She sate in a ditch, 
    Although no one knew which,
    And composed a small treatise on history.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Edward Lear, titled "More Nonsense Limerick 79", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
